ALTERED AUDIO  —  Filter 76  v0.8.2
VST3 Plugin  |  Windows 64-bit
=====================================

INSTALLATION — OPTION A (recommended, system-wide)
----------------------------------------------------
1. Run install.ps1 by right-clicking it and choosing
   "Run with PowerShell".  It will ask for admin rights
   and copy the plugin to the correct location.

INSTALLATION — OPTION B (manual copy)
--------------------------------------
1. Copy the folder  "AlteredAudio Filter 76.vst3"
   into one of these locations:

   System-wide (all users):
     C:\Program Files\Common Files\VST3\

   Current user only:
     C:\Users\[YourName]\AppData\Roaming\VST3\

2. Rescan plugins in your DAW.

USER PRESETS
------------
Presets you save inside the plugin are stored at:
  Documents\AlteredAudio\Filter 76\Presets\
The folder is created automatically on first save.

SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
-------------------
- Windows 10 64-bit or later
- VST3-compatible DAW
  (Ableton Live, Bitwig, FL Studio, Reaper, Studio One, etc.)
- CPU: any modern x86-64 processor
- Recommended sample rates: 44.1 kHz / 48 kHz
  (96 kHz not officially tested)

FACTORY PRESETS
---------------
  001  INIT           — default state
  002  ANALOG LOWPASS — warm resonant LP
  003  ACID SQUELCH   — envelope-modulated squelch
  004  SLOW SWEEP     — LFO low-pass sweep
  005  TELEPHONE      — bandpass telephone effect
  006  NOTCH WOBBLE   — notch with LFO wobble

QUICK START
-----------
- Drag the node on the spectrum display to set frequency / Q
- Scroll the display to adjust drive
- Double-click the display to reset freq + Q
- Right-click RATE, ATTACK or RELEASE for tempo-sync options
- Click the preset number to browse all presets
- Click SAVE to save your current state as a new preset
